title: ononis angustissima var. longifolia
intro: Ononis angustissima var. longifolia, also known as the narrow-leaved gromwell, is a plant species belonging to the legume family. It is a perennial herb with a long history of use in traditional medicine, valued for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antimicrobial, and antioxidant effects. The plant has been traditionally used to treat various health conditions, such as skin issues, wounds, and respiratory problems, due to its health benefits, including its ability to soothe and heal the skin, reduce inflammation, and act as an expectorant. Herbal preparations of Ononis angustissima var. longifolia can be found in the form of tinctures, infusions, and creams, which are used topically to apply its medicinal properties directly to the affected area.
